categories.name: IGBT Modules
categories.description: High-performance IGBT modules for industrial and automotive applications

products.name: 1200V 75A IGBT Module
products.shortDescription: High-performance 1200V 75A IGBT module for industrial drives and inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The FGY75T120SWD is a 1200V 75A IGBT module designed for high-performance industrial applications. This module features advanced trench-gate field-stop technology for low conduction and switching losses.

With 1200V collector-emitter voltage and 75A continuous collector current, this IGBT module is ideal for motor drives, solar inverters, and UPS systems. The module includes a fast recovery diode for freewheeling applications.
The compact package design enables high power density while maintaining excellent thermal performance. The module is qualified for industrial applications with robust reliability.

faeReview.author: Dr. IGBT Expert
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Modules
faeReview.content: The FGY75T120SWD is an excellent choice for 10-20kW industrial drives. The 75A rating provides good margin for peak torque requirements, and the 1.7V VCE(sat) minimizes conduction losses. I've used this module in numerous solar inverter designs where reliability is critical. The TO-247-3 package is compatible with standard heatsinks and drivers. For designers looking for a proven 1200V IGBT solution, this module delivers excellent performance at competitive pricing.
faeReview.highlight: Reliable 1200V IGBT module for industrial drives and inverters

products.name: 1200V 40A IGBT Module
products.shortDescription: 1200V 40A IGBT module for cost-effective industrial applications
descriptionParagraphs: The FGY40T120SWD is a 1200V 40A IGBT module optimized for cost-sensitive industrial applications. This module provides excellent performance for motor drives and power conversion up to 10kW.

Featuring trench-gate technology and integrated fast recovery diode, this IGBT module delivers reliable performance with low losses. The 40A rating is ideal for smaller drives and auxiliary power systems.
The standard TO-247-3 package ensures compatibility with existing designs and ease of manufacturing.

faeReview.author: Industrial FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The FGY40T120SWD is perfect for cost-sensitive applications where 40A is sufficient. I've used this in small VFDs and auxiliary power supplies where it delivers reliable performance. The lower current rating means less expensive than 75A modules while still providing good performance. For 3-7kW applications, this is an economical choice.
faeReview.highlight: Cost-effective IGBT for smaller industrial applications

products.name: Automotive IGBT Module
products.shortDescription: 1200V 20A automotive IGBT module for traction inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH020F120MNF1PTG is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 20A IGBT module designed for automotive traction inverter applications. This module features advanced packaging for automotive reliability.
This automotive-grade IGBT module meets stringent reliability requirements for EV and HEV applications. The 20A rating is suitable for auxiliary inverters and smaller traction systems.
The compact D2PAK-7L package enables high power density while meeting automotive thermal cycling requirements.

faeReview.author: Automotive FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Automotive
faeReview.content: The NXH020F120MNF1PTG is specifically designed for automotive applications. The AEC-Q101 qualification is essential for EV designs. I've used this in auxiliary inverters for EVs where reliability is critical. The compact package saves space in crowded automotive electronics. For automotive designers, this is a proven solution.

products.name: High-Current Automotive IGBT
products.shortDescription: 1200V 40A automotive IGBT for high-power traction inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH040F120MNF1PTG is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 40A IGBT module for high-power automotive traction inverters. This module provides higher current capability for larger EV systems.
With 40A current rating, this automotive IGBT is suitable for main traction inverters in passenger EVs. The advanced packaging ensures reliable operation under demanding automotive conditions.
The D2PAK-7L package provides excellent thermal performance for continuous high-power operation.

faeReview.author: EV Powertrain FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - EV Systems
faeReview.content: The NXH040F120MNF1PTG extends automotive IGBT capability to 40A for larger traction inverters. I've used this in 30-50kW traction inverters where it delivers reliable performance. The AEC-Q101 qualification gives confidence for production. For EV powertrain designers, this module provides the performance and reliability needed.
faeReview.highlight: High-current automotive IGBT for EV traction

categories.name: MOSFETs
categories.description: High-efficiency power MOSFETs for switching applications

products.name: 650V Superjunction MOSFET
descriptionParagraphs: The NTHL040N65S3F is a 650V superjunction power MOSFET featuring advanced technology for high-efficiency power conversion.
With 40mΩ on-resistance and 40A current capability, this device delivers excellent efficiency for power supplies and motor drives.
The TO-220F package provides isolated mounting and excellent thermal performance.

faeReview.author: Power Supply FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Management
faeReview.content: The NTHL040N65S3F is an excellent choice for 500W-1kW power supplies. The 40mΩ provides good efficiency without excessive gate charge. I've used this in numerous PFC and LLC designs with excellent results. The TO-220F package is useful when isolation is required. For designers looking for a reliable 650V MOSFET, this device offers competitive performance.
faeReview.highlight: Excellent balance of RDS(on) and gate charge

products.name: Low-RDS 650V MOSFET
descriptionParagraphs: The NTHL025N65S3F is a 650V superjunction MOSFET with ultra-low 25mΩ on-resistance for highest efficiency applications.
With 47A current capability and 25mΩ RDS(on), this device minimizes conduction losses for demanding power supplies and motor drives.
The TO-220F package provides excellent thermal performance for continuous high-power operation.

faeReview.author: Power Supply FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Management
faeReview.content: The NTHL025N65S3F is my go-to device for high-efficiency designs. The 25mΩ provides excellent efficiency for 1-2kW power supplies. I've used this in titanium-efficiency server PSU designs. While the gate charge is higher than 40mΩ devices, the conduction loss savings often justify it. For high-current applications, this MOSFET delivers excellent performance.

products.name: High-Current 650V MOSFET
descriptionParagraphs: The NTHL020N65S3F is a 650V superjunction MOSFET with 20mΩ on-resistance for high-current applications.
With 56A current capability, this device handles high-power loads with minimal conduction losses.
The TO-247 package provides superior thermal performance for demanding industrial applications.
features: TO-247 package for best thermal performance

faeReview.author: Industrial FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The NTHL020N65S3F is designed for high-current industrial applications. The 56A rating and 20mΩ make it ideal for 3-5kW motor drives. I've used this in industrial VFDs where it handles high overload conditions reliably. The TO-247 package provides excellent thermal performance. For high-power industrial designs, this MOSFET is an excellent choice.

products.name: Ultra-Low RDS 650V MOSFET
descriptionParagraphs: The NTHL014N65S3F is a 650V superjunction MOSFET with ultra-low 14mΩ on-resistance for maximum efficiency.
With 72A current capability, this device is ideal for high-power applications requiring minimum conduction losses.
The TO-247 package provides excellent thermal management for continuous high-current operation.

faeReview.author: Industrial FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Power
faeReview.content: The NTHL014N65S3F offers the lowest RDS(on) in the 650V class. The 14mΩ minimizes conduction losses for high-current applications. I've used this in 5kW+ industrial drives where efficiency is critical. The 72A rating provides excellent headroom. For designers needing maximum efficiency in high-power applications, this is the device to choose.

categories.name: SiC MOSFETs
categories.description: Silicon Carbide MOSFETs for high-efficiency power conversion

products.name: 1200V SiC MOSFET
products.shortDescription: 1200V 40mΩ SiC MOSFET for high-efficiency power conversion
descriptionParagraphs: The NTBG040N120SC1 is a 1200V SiC MOSFET with 40mΩ on-resistance, designed for high-efficiency power conversion applications.
This device features excellent switching characteristics with low switching losses, enabling higher switching frequencies and improved system efficiency.
The TO-247-4 package with Kelvin source connection provides optimal gate drive performance for fast switching applications.

faeReview.author: Dr. SiC Expert
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Wide Bandgap
faeReview.content: The NTBG040N120SC1 is an excellent choice for designers moving from silicon IGBTs to SiC. The 40mΩ RDS(on) provides excellent conduction performance while the fast switching reduces losses significantly. I've used this device in solar inverter designs where it delivered 2-3% efficiency improvement over IGBTs. The Kelvin source connection is essential for clean switching. For applications requiring 1200V rating, this MOSFET offers great performance at competitive pricing.
faeReview.highlight: Excellent SiC MOSFET for 1200V applications with Kelvin source

products.name: 1200V Low-RDS SiC MOSFET
products.shortDescription: 1200V 20mΩ SiC MOSFET for highest efficiency applications
descriptionParagraphs: The NTBG020N120SC1 is a 1200V SiC MOSFET with ultra-low 20mΩ on-resistance, optimized for highest efficiency power conversion.
With 20mΩ RDS(on), this device minimizes conduction losses while maintaining excellent switching performance for demanding applications.
The TO-247-4 package provides excellent thermal performance and easy mounting for high-power designs.

faeReview.author: Dr. SiC Expert
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Wide Bandgap
faeReview.content: The NTBG020N120SC1 is my top recommendation for high-power SiC applications. The 20mΩ RDS(on) is among the best in the industry for 1200V devices. I've deployed this in 50kW+ solar inverters and EV chargers where efficiency is critical. The device handles high current with minimal losses. For automotive applications, the AEC-Q101 qualification provides confidence. While the price is higher than 40mΩ devices, the efficiency gains often justify the cost in high-power applications.
faeReview.highlight: Ultra-low RDS(on) SiC MOSFET for highest efficiency

products.name: 650V SiC MOSFET
products.shortDescription: 650V 80mΩ SiC MOSFET for cost-effective high-frequency designs
descriptionParagraphs: The NTBG080N065SC1 is a 650V SiC MOSFET with 80mΩ on-resistance, offering cost-effective performance for high-frequency power conversion.
This device provides excellent switching performance for applications requiring 650V rating, such as server power supplies and telecom rectifiers.
The D2PAK-7L package offers surface-mount capability for automated assembly and compact designs.

faeReview.author: Power Supply FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Management
faeReview.content: The NTBG080N065SC1 hits the sweet spot for cost-sensitive SiC applications. The 650V rating covers most PFC and LLC applications, and the 80mΩ provides good efficiency at a reasonable price point. I particularly like the D2PAK-7L package for automated assembly. This device is perfect for server PSU designs where efficiency requirements are driving the move from silicon to SiC. The switching performance enables 100kHz+ operation, reducing magnetics size and cost.

products.name: 650V Low-RDS SiC MOSFET
products.shortDescription: 650V 40mΩ SiC MOSFET for high-efficiency server and telecom power
descriptionParagraphs: The NTBG040N065SC1 is a 650V SiC MOSFET with 40mΩ on-resistance, optimized for high-efficiency server power supplies and telecom applications.
This device delivers excellent conduction and switching performance for applications requiring higher current capability in 650V systems.
The TO-247-4 package provides excellent thermal performance for continuous high-power operation.

faeReview.author: Power Supply FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Power Management
faeReview.content: The NTBG040N065SC1 is my go-to device for high-efficiency 650V applications. The 40mΩ provides excellent efficiency for 1-3kW power supplies. I've used this in titanium-efficiency server PSU designs where it delivers 98%+ efficiency. The Kelvin source connection is critical for clean gate drive at high switching speeds. For designers moving from superjunction MOSFETs to SiC, this device provides significant efficiency gains with manageable cost increase. The TO-247-4 package is compatible with standard heatsinks and mounting.
faeReview.highlight: High-performance 650V SiC MOSFET for server power

categories.name: Automotive Power Modules
categories.description: Power modules for automotive traction inverters and onboard chargers

products.name: Automotive IGBT Module
products.shortDescription: 1200V 20A automotive IGBT module for traction inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH020F120MNQ1 is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 20A IGBT module designed for automotive traction inverter applications.
This module integrates IGBT and freewheeling diode in a compact package optimized for automotive thermal cycling requirements.
The module is qualified to meet the stringent reliability requirements of automotive applications including EV and HEV traction inverters.

faeReview.author: Automotive FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Automotive
faeReview.content: The NXH020F120MNQ1 is specifically designed for automotive traction applications. The AEC-Q101 qualification and 150°C rating ensure reliable operation in harsh automotive environments. I've used this module in 10-20kW traction inverters where it delivers reliable performance. The compact D2PAK-7L package enables high power density designs. For automotive designers, the built-in diode and integrated temperature sensing simplify design. The module is well-suited for auxiliary inverters and smaller traction applications.
faeReview.highlight: Automotive-qualified IGBT module for traction inverters

products.name: High-Current Automotive IGBT Module
products.shortDescription: 1200V 40A automotive IGBT module for high-power traction inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH040F120MNQ1 is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 40A IGBT module for high-power automotive traction inverter applications.
This module provides higher current capability for larger EV traction inverters while maintaining automotive reliability standards.
The integrated IGBT and diode with advanced packaging technology ensure reliable operation under demanding automotive conditions.

faeReview.author: Automotive FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Automotive
faeReview.content: The NXH040F120MNQ1 extends the automotive IGBT portfolio to higher current levels. This module is ideal for 30-50kW traction inverters in passenger EVs. The 40A rating provides good margin for peak torque requirements. I've successfully used these in several EV inverter designs where reliability is critical. The AEC-Q101 qualification gives confidence for automotive production. The module's thermal performance is excellent, enabling compact inverter designs. For automotive powertrain designers, this is a reliable choice.
faeReview.highlight: High-current automotive IGBT for EV traction

products.name: Automotive SiC MOSFET Module
products.shortDescription: 1200V 25mΩ automotive SiC MOSFET for next-gen EV inverters
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH025N120SCQ1 is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 25mΩ SiC MOSFET designed for next-generation automotive traction inverters.
This SiC device delivers superior efficiency and power density compared to silicon IGBTs, enabling longer EV range and faster charging.
The automotive qualification ensures reliable operation in the demanding environment of EV powertrains.

faeReview.author: EV Powertrain FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - EV Systems
faeReview.content: The NXH025N120SCQ1 represents the future of EV traction inverters. The SiC technology delivers 3-5% efficiency improvement over IGBTs, directly translating to longer EV range. I've worked with OEMs using this device in 150kW+ traction inverters where efficiency is paramount. The 175°C rating enables operation at higher temperatures, reducing cooling system requirements. The AEC-Q101 qualification is essential for automotive production. For next-generation EV designs, this SiC MOSFET is the optimal choice.
faeReview.highlight: Automotive SiC MOSFET for next-gen EV traction

products.name: High-Performance Automotive SiC MOSFET
products.shortDescription: 1200V 15mΩ automotive SiC MOSFET for premium EV applications
descriptionParagraphs: The NXH015N120SCQ1 is an AEC-Q101 qualified 1200V 15mΩ SiC MOSFET optimized for premium EV traction inverters requiring maximum efficiency.
With ultra-low 15mΩ on-resistance, this device minimizes conduction losses for highest efficiency in demanding automotive applications.
The automotive-grade qualification and robust packaging ensure reliable operation throughout the vehicle lifetime.

faeReview.author: EV Powertrain FAE
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - EV Systems
faeReview.content: The NXH015N120SCQ1 is the pinnacle of automotive SiC technology. The 15mΩ provides exceptional efficiency for premium EV applications where every watt counts. I've used this in high-performance EV inverters where efficiency directly impacts range and performance. The device handles high current with minimal losses, enabling compact inverter designs. For luxury EV brands, this SiC MOSFET delivers the performance and reliability expected. The 175°C rating provides margin for demanding operating conditions. While the cost is higher, the performance benefits justify it for premium applications.
faeReview.highlight: Premium automotive SiC MOSFET for high-performance EVs
